goal: Call the RDS module from dev and prod root modules, declare required variables, add tfvars, and run project-wide formatting/validation.
summary: Phase 2 wired the RDS module into both dev and prod root modules: updated main.tf to call module.rds, variables.tf to declare RDS variables, terraform.tfvars to set explicit values, and ran project-wide terraform fmt -recursive -check and terraform validate in both environments successfully.
stepSummaries:
1. Update terraform/environments/dev/main.tf to call module.rds, passing subnet_ids, rds_sg_id, eks_node_sg_id, and environment-specific settings. [verified]
  2. Update terraform/environments/dev/variables.tf to declare any new RDS variables not already present. [verified]
  3. Update terraform/environments/dev/terraform.tfvars with RDS values or confirm defaults are acceptable. [verified]
  4. Update terraform/environments/prod/main.tf, variables.tf, and terraform.tfvars with prod RDS wiring. [verified]
  5. Run project-wide terraform fmt -recursive -check and validate both environments. [verified]

gateVerdicts.rationale: All five steps used real verification (file edits, terraform fmt, validate).

gateVerdicts.rationale: Combined output delivers phase goal: both environments call the RDS module with required inputs and explicit tfvars, and formatting/validation passed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: terraform/environments/dev/main.tf and prod/main.tf contain module.rds blocks; variables.tf and terraform.tfvars updated; validate succeeded.
